content: Welcome to the general channel everyone!
Thanks Bob! Glad to be here.

Hey all - quick question about <m-document-mention>{"documentId":"00000000-0000-0000-0002-00000000000e","blockName":"md","documentName":"Onboarding Guide","blockParams":{},"collapsed":false}</m-document-mention> - is it up to date?
Sure thing <m-user-mention>{"userId":"macro|dana@example.com","email":"dana@example.com"}</m-user-mention> - I can walk you through it.
Reminder: all-hands meeting tomorrow at 10am. <m-user-mention>{"userId":"macro|charlie@example.com","email":"charlie@example.com"}</m-user-mention> can you send out the agenda?
Will there be a recording for those who can't attend?
Anyone tried that new coffee place on 5th?
Yes! The cold brew is amazing.
Adding it to my list for this week.

<m-document-mention>{"documentId":"00000000-0000-0000-0002-000000000001","blockName":"pdf","documentName":"Project Roadmap","blockParams":{},"collapsed":false}</m-document-mention> draft is ready for review. <m-user-mention>{"userId":"macro|charlie@example.com","email":"charlie@example.com"}</m-user-mention> take a look when you get a chance.

Looks good - left a few comments on <m-document-mention>{"documentId":"00000000-0000-0000-0002-000000000010","blockName":"pdf","documentName":"Product Requirements","blockParams":{},"collapsed":false}</m-document-mention>.

<m-document-mention>{"documentId":"00000000-0000-0000-0002-000000000005","blockName":"md","documentName":"Sprint Retro Notes","blockParams":{},"collapsed":false}</m-document-mention> have been uploaded.
<m-user-mention>{"userId":"macro|eve@example.com","email":"eve@example.com"}</m-user-mention> can we discuss the velocity drop next standup?

Agreed - I think the new estimation process might be a factor. I documented it in <m-document-mention>{"documentId":"00000000-0000-0000-0002-000000000014","blockName":"md","documentName":"Incident Postmortem","blockParams":{},"collapsed":false}</m-document-mention>.

Should we move this conversation to a named channel? <m-user-mention>{"userId":"macro|charlie@example.com","email":"charlie@example.com"}</m-user-mention> <m-user-mention>{"userId":"macro|dana@example.com","email":"dana@example.com"}</m-user-mention> thoughts?
Good idea - let me set one up.

<m-user-mention>{"userId":"macro|eve@example.com","email":"eve@example.com"}</m-user-mention> can you review my PR when you get a chance? It touches <m-document-mention>{"documentId":"00000000-0000-0000-0002-000000000008","blockName":"md","documentName":"API Documentation","blockParams":{},"collapsed":false}</m-document-mention>.
On it <m-user-mention>{"userId":"macro|dana@example.com","email":"dana@example.com"}</m-user-mention> - will have feedback by EOD.
Hey - are you free for a quick sync?

Sent you the updated <m-document-mention>{"documentId":"00000000-0000-0000-0002-000000000009","blockName":"canvas","documentName":"Wireframe Draft","blockParams":{},"collapsed":false}</m-document-mention>.
Thanks for the help earlier!
